EMPLOYMENT OFFER LETTER

Date: January 15, 2024

Dear John Smith,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Software Engineer at TechCorp Inc., 
effective February 1, 2024.

1. POSITION AND DUTIES
You will report to the VP of Engineering and will be responsible for designing, developing, 
and maintaining software applications. Your primary work location will be our San Francisco 
office, with the option to work remotely up to 3 days per week.

2. COMPENSATION
Your annual base salary will be $185,000, paid bi-weekly. You will also be eligible for an 
annual performance bonus of up to 15% of your base salary, subject to company and individual 
performance targets.

3. BENEFITS
You will be eligible for the company's standard benefits package, including:
- Health, dental, and vision insurance
- 401(k) retirement plan with 4% company match
- 20 days of paid time off per year
- 10 paid holidays

4. EQUITY
You will receive a stock option grant of 10,000 shares, vesting over 4 years with a 1-year 
cliff. The exercise price will be the fair market value on your start date.

5. CONFIDENTIALITY
You agree to maintain the confidentiality of all proprietary information, trade secrets, and 
business strategies of TechCorp Inc. during and after your employment. This obligation survives 
termination of employment.

6. NON-COMPETE
For a period of 12 months following termination of employment, you agree not to engage in any 
business that directly competes with TechCorp Inc. within the United States. This restriction 
applies regardless of the reason for termination.

7. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
All inventions, discoveries, and works of authorship created during your employment and related 
to the company's business shall be the exclusive property of TechCorp Inc.

8. TERMINATION
Either party may terminate this employment relationship at any time, with or without cause, 
upon 30 days written notice. In the event of termination without cause by the company, you 
will receive 3 months of severance pay.

9. GOVERNING LAW
This agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State 
of California, without regard to its conflict of laws provisions.

10. DISPUTE RESOLUTION
Any disputes arising from this agreement shall be resolved through binding arbitration in 
San Francisco, California, in accordance with the rules of the American Arbitration Association.

This offer is contingent upon successful completion of a background check and verification 
of your eligibility to work in the United States.

Please sign and return this letter by January 25, 2024, to confirm your acceptance.

Sincerely,

Jane Doe
VP of Human Resources
TechCorp Inc.

ACCEPTED AND AGREED:

_________________________
John Smith
Date: ___________________
